issue: 'two co-equal lanes' omits Lane C (skill-benchmark); awareness block stale after Lane C, last touched in 121 era. Operator-flagged three-lane dimension.
fix: Change 'two co-equal lanes' to 'three co-equal lanes' and add a Lane C clause; canonical source then mirror-synced.

issue: Mirror also says 'two co-equal lanes' (identical to .gemini/agents/deep-improvement.md:29). Stale after Lane C.
fix: Mirror-sync the three-lane correction from canonical .opencode/agents/deep-improvement.md.

issue: Docs-vs-code drift: 'VALID_MODES is a closed two-value set' but loop-host.cjs:31 has three values; sentence also omits the --mode=skill-benchmark route. Breadth pass missed this.
fix: Change to 'closed three-value set' and add the --mode=skill-benchmark -> run-skill-benchmark.cjs route.

issue: D1-inter mislabeled as unbuilt follow-on alongside D4. D1-inter IS built+deterministic (advisor-probe.cjs, score-skill-benchmark.cjs:107-135), opt-in via --advisor-mode=python; contradicts scoring_contract.md:9.
fix: Mark D1-inter built-but-opt-in; keep only D4 + Mode B as follow-on.

issue: --advisor-mode (the only doc path to the built D1-inter feature) is undocumented in operator_guide Invocation and the command file, though run-skill-benchmark.cjs:49,54,92 reads it.
fix: Add [--advisor-mode=python] to documented invocation in operator_guide.md and the command file with a one-line description.

issue: SKILL_BENCHMARK_RUN_OPTIONS dead-forwards profile,state-log,label,grader,k-runs; run() (run-skill-benchmark.cjs:49) consumes none of them.
fix: Trim SKILL_BENCHMARK_RUN_OPTIONS to the genuinely-consumed flags (fixtures-dir, output, trace-mode, advisor-mode).

issue: weights block + implied --profile override are unwired; WEIGHTS hardcoded in score-skill-benchmark.cjs:19. Scaffold with no runtime consumer.
fix: Wire --profile loading or annotate weights as a forward-looking reference profile not yet consumed by Mode A.

issue: Lane C reference docs (scoring_contract/operator_guide/scenario_authoring) and JSON assets lack the frontmatter + numbered OVERVIEW + ALL-CAPS headers that the skill's OWN Lane A/B reference docs use. template_rules.json marks these recommended/optional, not required; raw-JSON assets are a repo pattern. Consistency polish, not structural violation (iter5 over-escalated to 13xP0).
fix: Add title/type/status frontmatter + ## 1. OVERVIEW + numbered ALL-CAPS H2s to the three reference docs to match Lane A/B siblings.

issue: Missing-SKILL.md early-return sets score:0 while the penalty formula (line 91-92) would give 60 for the same one-P0 condition. Verdict unaffected (gateFailed set both ways) but raw score inconsistent for debug/compare consumers.
fix: Return score:60 in the early-return branch, or fall through to the shared penalty computation.

issue: E2E test runs cli-codex (no fixtures) so scenarioRows is empty and asserts only schema/artifacts; plus uncleaned temp dir and uncovered ambiguity/negative-fixture cases. Unit scorer tests DO cover scoring, so this is polish not false-confidence.
fix: Assert scenarioRows.length>0 via the deep-improvement skill (ships a real fixture); add afterAll cleanup and the two edge-case rows.

issue: Stale 'Not committed yet' / parallel-revert-hazard note; the rename landed at commit caf072e39e (in HEAD). Spec 'Complete' status is now correct; only the impl-summary note is stale.
fix: Update to 'Committed at caf072e39e' and drop the hazard caveat; completion_pct:100 is now accurate.
